facebook-scrape.summary: Scraped Facebook (6:12 AM ET Mar 31). No new activity in ~1hr since last run. Notifications at 17 (up 1 from admin group description update on Homeowners looking for Contractors — not a lead). Checked USA Car Detailing Services, Pressure Washing Business Owners, and Window Cleaning Newbies posts directly — 0 new comments on all three. Messenger inbox unchanged: Brady Fellows, Byron Peabody, Anthony Cocchi (3d ago), Ann Giroux (unread E2EE, same as before) — no new DM threads. All March 30 late-night posts (Junk Removal Winners, USA Car Detailing, Pressure Washing, Pro Window Cleaning, Window Cleaning Newbies) confirmed live. Totals unchanged: 113 comments, 38 positive, 2 DMs, 12 interest signals, 16 groups, 18 posts live. March 31 daily: 2 comments, 1 positive, 1 DM, 1 interest signal.

linkedin-scrape.summary: Scraped LinkedIn (5:37 AM ET Mar 31): 1,039 total connections (unchanged), 153 pending sent requests (most recent batch sent ~6 hours ago — same landscaping/electrical owner batch: Jacob Senoski, William Gonzalez, Bryan Kersey, Ricardo Gomez, Antwain Flowers, Garrett Lorenzen, Jeff Wingren, Jeremy Dickey, Tim Lee, Blair Anson), 0 new acceptances, 8 outreach messages sent (unchanged — Colin Crump, Tyler Grodsky, David Kozak, Jason Stahlberg, William DeMichele on Mar 25; Michael Rose, Rich Iandoli, Adam Quenneville earlier), 0 prospect replies, 0 interest signals. Messaging inbox shows (2) unread: Vincent Handugan VA vendor pitch (Mar 20) and Keri Ribardiere sponsored message (Mar 26) — neither is buying intent. All metrics unchanged from prior run.
